title: Makefile: run "go" with $(BUILDTAGS)
body: Run the "go" command with the $(BUILDTAGS) makefile variable passed in as build tags.  We don't currently set it, but we'll need to eventually, and adding it now does no harm.

comments.body: :+1: just waiting for tests and I'll merge it
Hmm, maybe BUILDFLAGS instead of BUILDTAGS?

> Hmm, maybe BUILDFLAGS instead of BUILDTAGS?

I don't mind, BUILDTAGS is fine since go uses `-tags` :)
Works for me.  It's not like any of this is set in stone.  Thanks!
